case_title: MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP VS FRANCO ANA

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $715.05 FILED BY MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP AS TO DEFENDANT FRANCO ANA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-28-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MONTGOMERY WARD CREDIT CORP RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FRANCO ANA $715.05 PRINCIPAL, $57.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $772.05, STIP: $100. BY 6/7/93 THEN $40. BY 6/14/93,6/21/93 6/28/93 & 7/6/93 THEN $24. PER MONTH BEGIN 7/19/93 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT FRANCO ANA
